subcodes.first_line: Hearken thou unto that which is revealed unto thee from the right hand of the throne of thy Lord, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise. Turn thou with all thy being unto thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع لما یوحی الیک عن یمین عرش ربک العلیم الحکیم ان اقبل بتمامک الی مولی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @life and death, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
